hero.title: Aisha and the Sands of Destiny
hero.caption: A luminous animated feature pitch: palace walls, forbidden markets, ancient magic, comic companions, and a princess learning to cross the line.

gallery.title: Hawk Warning
gallery.caption: Altair warning
gallery.description: Altair tears across the dunes toward the palace gates with the urgent scroll that breaks the ordinary morning. The kingdom still looks prosperous, but the first alarm is already cutting through the sky.

gallery.title: Merchant Caravan
gallery.caption: Gate procession
gallery.description: Colorful traders approach Qazar al-Zaman with camels, fabrics, spices, oils, and strange little treasures. This is the lively world Aisha has been forbidden to touch, full of comedy, trade, and movement.

gallery.title: Royal Scroll
gallery.caption: Forbidden message
gallery.description: Aisha reaches for Altair’s scroll, turning a small delivery into the first act of rebellion. The message opens the map of danger outside the palace and makes her protected life feel suddenly too small.

gallery.title: Forbidden Map
gallery.caption: Truth appears
gallery.description: The scroll reveals that the world beyond the palace is not a fairytale backdrop but a kingdom in distress. Aisha begins to understand that waiting politely may be another form of danger.

gallery.title: Royal Library
gallery.caption: Restless princess
gallery.description: Aisha’s library is beautiful, protected, and overflowing with books, but it cannot answer the question that matters most: what is really happening outside the palace walls?

gallery.title: Thousand Wonders
gallery.caption: Market freedom
gallery.description: The market becomes Aisha’s first taste of real freedom: dazzling, chaotic, fragrant, and alive. Wonder is everywhere, but so are traps hidden inside beautiful things.

gallery.title: Snake Rescue
gallery.caption: Niura saved
gallery.description: Aisha rescues tiny Niura, the white snake who first seems like a small market curiosity and later becomes one of the story’s cleverest protectors.

gallery.title: Desert Ride
gallery.caption: Tamlun carries her
gallery.description: Aisha rides Tamlun into the desert, leaving palace safety for a landscape that is vast, sun-struck, and full of consequences. This is freedom becoming responsibility.

gallery.title: Morning Fountain
gallery.caption: Kindness in Mayala
gallery.description: In the morning plaza, Bedouin warmth and fountain light give Aisha a human pause between danger and destiny. The scene shows the kind of ordinary life she is fighting to protect.

gallery.title: Ruined Shelter
gallery.caption: Broken city
gallery.description: Aisha reaches the ruined city and sees what the crisis has done to real homes. The adventure becomes heavier here: not only magic, but families, hunger, fear, and survival.

gallery.title: Dream Veil
gallery.caption: Mirage temptation
gallery.description: The perfume seller offers beauty as a trap. In Mirage City, scent, memory, and desire become weapons, and Aisha must learn that not every kindness is safe.

gallery.title: Mirage Mount
gallery.caption: Mir-Kaan’s spectacle
gallery.description: Aisha and Prince Mir-Kaan ride Maz-Khar through the seductive grandeur of Mirage City. It is beautiful, thrilling, and deeply staged to make danger feel like destiny.

gallery.title: Time Chamber
gallery.caption: Hourglass secret
gallery.description: Inside the hourglass chamber, Aisha begins to face the machinery of time itself. The image marks the shift from escape story into mythic responsibility.

gallery.title: Hourglass Chamber
gallery.caption: Dora beside her
gallery.description: Aisha and Dora stand inside the impossible chamber, small against the scale of the hourglass. Their friendship becomes the emotional anchor inside the vastness of the myth.

gallery.title: Talisman Won
gallery.caption: Sharak’s triumph
gallery.description: Sharak finally holds the talisman, convinced it will return what he lost. The victory is frightening because it is powered by grief, obsession, and a love that has become possession.

gallery.title: Moonlit Lake
gallery.caption: Plasma Djinn
gallery.description: Aisha meets the Plasma character by the lake in a quiet, luminous beat of trust. The magic is not only spectacle here; it becomes tenderness, regret, and protection.

characters.name: Aisha
characters.description: A curious sixteen-year-old princess whose longing for the outside world becomes the spark that changes two kingdoms.
characters.backstory: Raised behind palace walls for her own protection, Aisha has been taught safety before truth. Her story begins when wonder becomes stronger than fear.

characters.name: Dora
characters.description: A pampered royal guardian with a lazy smile, sharp comic timing, and far more loyalty than she admits.
characters.backstory: Dora would prefer sunbeams, grapes, and politics delayed forever, but she follows Aisha into danger because love is stronger than comfort.

characters.name: Niura
characters.description: Small, fragile, funny, and brave: Niura enters as a rescued creature and becomes a loyal signal of danger and hidden truth.
characters.backstory: Niura’s first wish is simply not to disappear in a pot. Aisha sees her fear, opens the cage, and gains a companion with a moonlit destiny.

characters.name: Plasma Djinn
characters.description: A floating human-like figure made of golden plasma, torn between obedience, guilt, and the instinct to protect Aisha when it matters most.
characters.backstory: He carries the ache of an old spell and the shame of serving the wrong master. His arc bends from frightened messenger to brave shield, choosing love and truth over command.

characters.name: Altair
characters.description: A frantic royal hawk whose urgent delivery style is half military protocol, half comedy missile.
characters.backstory: Altair’s chaos opens doors. One scroll, one scream, one awkward hover beside the balcony: opportunity does knock, or scream.

characters.name: Sultan Amarkhan al-Hadith
characters.description: A grieving ruler who confuses protection with silence until Aisha’s courage forces him to face what he buried.
characters.backstory: He built walls around the kingdom and around his daughter. His arc is learning that love cannot survive by hiding truth forever.

characters.name: Prince Thamir
characters.role: Lost prince of the restored kingdom
characters.description: A gentle prince bound to the mystery of the sands, carrying warmth, secrecy, and a luminous connection to Aisha.
characters.backstory: Thamir’s path is hidden inside the spell history of the kingdoms. When balance returns, so does the future he and Aisha almost lost.

characters.name: Sharak
characters.description: A theatrical villain of velvet, plasma, grief, and obsession, dangerous because he believes his wound is destiny.
characters.backstory: Sharak’s love curdled into possession. He is not darkness because he suffers; he becomes darkness because he makes the world pay for it.

characters.name: Nibzu
characters.description: Goofy, loyal, shiny-eyed, and just dangerous enough to make every villain scene bounce.
characters.backstory: Nibzu is comic relief with too many legs and terrible timing. Somehow, that makes Sharak scarier and funnier at once.

characters.name: The Oracle
characters.description: A watchful keeper of forbidden knowledge, elegant and severe, with memory hidden behind every jewel.
characters.backstory: The Oracle guards old consequences. She stands where prophecy stops being decorative and becomes dangerous.

characters.name: Maz-Khar
characters.description: A massive creature built for storm scale, battlefield silhouette, and desert myth.
characters.backstory: Maz-Khar turns the desert itself into a chase machine: not a horse, not a monster, but a legend with hooves.

characters.name: Prince Mir-Kaan
characters.description: Polished, charming, and manipulative, Mir-Kaan smiles like a door closing.
characters.backstory: Mir-Kaan belongs to the beautiful surface of the trap: everything glitters, every courtesy has teeth.

characters.name: The Mirage Vizier
characters.description: A silk-voiced court manipulator who guides Aisha toward the Mirage palace with polished courtesy, false concern, and the patience of a practiced trap.
characters.backstory: He does not drag Aisha into danger; he arranges the path so she chooses it. Every bow, smile, and gesture is designed to make the palace feel safe until the doors close.

characters.name: The Perfume Seller
characters.role: Mirage City seller of Dream Veil perfume
characters.description: A mesmerizing market woman surrounded by jewel-like perfume bottles, fragrant oils, and impossible scents, including the dangerous Dream Veil perfume.
characters.backstory: In Mirage City she sells memory as scent: rose, amber, blue smoke, and the Dream Veil perfume that makes longing feel like truth. She is not purely cruel, but her stall belongs to the city’s beautiful deception.

characters.name: The Bedouin Merchant
characters.description: A mysterious seller at the far edge of the market, surrounded by objects that feel older than the roads.
characters.backstory: He does not attack. He offers. His stall is a doorway disguised as a bargain, and the moonstone ring begins the next fracture of destiny.

characters.name: Zahra al Nour
characters.description: A luminous maternal presence whose memory becomes the emotional key to Aisha’s courage.
characters.backstory: Zafra is not only what was lost. She becomes the proof that love can survive as guidance, memory, and light.

characters.name: The Sand Ancestors
characters.description: Ancient guardians shaped from sand, memory, and sacred duty.
characters.backstory: They are awakened by Aisha’s courage and the kingdom’s buried memory, moving like sand that remembers its own name.

characters.name: Tamlun
characters.description: A gentle, massive creature with palace scale and travel-story charm.
characters.backstory: Tamlun carries the warmth of the road: ceremonial, useful, and quietly heroic in the way only loyal animals can be.

characters.name: Hala
characters.description: A gentle, curious child whose presence makes the market feel alive and personal.
characters.backstory: Hala is one of the small faces that turns the kingdom from a map into a living place worth protecting.

characters.name: Nadir
characters.description: A textured city character with warmth, humor, and market-life detail.
characters.backstory: Nadir helps make the market feel like a civilization, not a backdrop: every face has a rhythm, a job, and a private story.

characters.name: Maestra Safira
characters.description: A warm but strict elder who carries lessons, ceremony, and palace order.
characters.backstory: Safira represents the safe version of wisdom: useful, loving, and still not enough to hold Aisha back from the world.

characters.name: Layan
characters.description: A kind, heartfelt presence in the city streets, grounded in fabric, trade, and human warmth.
characters.backstory: Layan’s world is ordinary beauty: cloth, survival, tenderness, and the dignity of people Aisha was never allowed to know.

characters.description: Description
characters.backstory: Backstory

copy.artCopy: Choose an act, then browse twelve cinematic art slots for that chapter. As we add more final art, each act can receive its own dedicated set.
copy.charactersCopy: One active profile per section, with portrait selectors underneath. Text now lives in the same cinematic panel as the character.
copy.bookCopy: Readable pages inside the site, dark or light mode, act jumps, and direct page navigation.
copy.merchCopy: First premium product concepts for dolls, plush companions, villain packs, jewelry-toys, and electronic creature sets.
copy.contactCopy: Based between Spain and Los Angeles for festival conversations, co-production, music, animation, and distribution partnerships.

merch.title: Aisha Deluxe Fashion Doll
merch.subtitle: Royal wardrobe / festival edition
merch.copy: Premium doll line with palace, market, and gala looks, plus a darker Cannes-style collector package with gold filigree shelf presence.

merch.title: Dora Royal Panther Plush
merch.subtitle: Lazy guardian / luxury companion box
merch.copy: Soft white panther plush with a golden amulet collar, royal cushion, gift-box direction, and enough lazy attitude to sell the character in one glance.

merch.title: Niura Moon Bracelet Companion
merch.subtitle: Wearable creature toy
merch.copy: Elastic coil companion concept: Niura wraps like a bracelet, with changeable forehead markings and moon-glitter stickers.

merch.title: Sharak + Nibzu Villain Pack
merch.subtitle: Shadow king theatre set
merch.copy: A dramatic villain shelf piece: Sharak with plasma accessories, Nibzu sidekick, and a mini alchemy table.

merch.title: Tamlun Desert Crossing Plush
merch.subtitle: Giant travel companion
merch.copy: A big tactile creature plush with saddle details, caravan accessories, and soft fantasy-beast proportions.

merch.title: Maz-Khar Wing Builder
merch.subtitle: Animatronic creature concept
merch.copy: A modular electronic creature toy: attach wings, saddle, and light patterns, then trigger wing flaps and hover-display mode.

contact.title: Spain / Los Angeles
contact.intro: Interactive production route for BrightBox Animations, based in Spain and Los Angeles.

Fantastic film animation, music, cinematic AI production
